name: sci-research
description: Three independent multi-agent news pipelines plus a project-scoped Codex runtime setup. Skills orchestrate namespaced TOML custom agents with date verification, source-credibility assessment, editorial filtering, Fact Manifest discipline, and lifecycle quality hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Daily news intelligence, branded briefings, and reputation monitoring
interface.longDescription: Three independent pipelines: daily-news-intelligence (dated single-country briefing, mono- or bilingual, adaptively sourced and date-verified), daily-briefing (multi-country branded SPD Bank Word doc), and reputation-track (company adverse-media + social monitoring, HTML email only when negative). A setup skill installs the namespaced TOML custom agents into the active project before first run.
defaultPrompt: Generate a daily news intelligence report for Japan
Create a branded briefing from daily news reports
Monitor a company for reputational risk
Set up the Sci-Research runtime in this workspace
